label: High Risk: Cross-border anomaly 1

label: Medium/High: Velocity burst 1
description: Rapid repeat activity that compresses multiple transactions into a short window.

alert.analystNotes: Transaction cadence accelerated sharply compared with the prior week.

customer.accountHistoryNotes: Customer generally uses the account a few times per week. Current same-day volume is unusual.
customer.analystNotes: Transaction cadence accelerated sharply compared with the prior week.

label: High Risk: Account takeover pattern 1
description: New-device behavior combined with abrupt change in spend and profile confidence.

customer.accountHistoryNotes: Customer usually transacts on a long-standing device and rarely exceeds baseline spend limits.

label: Low/Medium: Travel context 1

label: Low/Medium: False-positive edge case 1
description: A narrow anomaly exists, but the surrounding context mostly fits expected behavior.

alert.analystNotes: Current transaction is elevated but still consistent with merchant and device history.

customer.accountHistoryNotes: Customer occasionally makes moderate one-off purchases at familiar domestic merchants without dispute activity.
